name: AWS IAM Service-Specific Credential Deletion Activity
description: Service-specific credentials are used to authenticate to AWS services like CodeCommit using IAM user credentials. Deleting such credentials may indicate credential rotation, offboarding, or potentially suspicious activity if performed unexpectedly. Monitoring this action helps identify possible access removal attempts or attempts to evade detection by erasing entry points.

rules.name: AWS IAM Service-Specific Credential Deletion Activity

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
